=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan July-10-1994 Tanzbrunnen  Cologne, Germany

Love Minus Zero
Invasion Unlimited 9430 2CD 

Silver cd>EAC (secure mode)>TLH (level 8)>maketorrent>HC
Artwork incluided


cd-1
01-Jokerman
02-The Man In Me
03-All Along The Watchtower
04-I Don't Believe You
05-Tangled Up In Blue
06-I'll Be Your Baby Tonight
07-Love Minus Zero
08-Masters Of War
09-Boots Of Spanish Leather
10-God Knows 

cd-2
01-I Believe In You
02-Maggie's Farm
03-Rainy Day Women #12 & 35
04-It Ain't Me Babe
05-Lay Lady Lay *
06-I Shall Be Released *
07-Don't Think Twice *
08-Ballad Of A Thin Man *

*  July-9-1994 Balingen  Messegelnde, Balingen, Germany
